prerequisites: Network access to the public DefiLlama API host (https://api.llama.fi). The connector defines no secret fields and no config fields, so no account, API key, or additional configuration is required.

authMethods.name: No authentication
authMethods.summary: The DefiLlama open API is public and keyless. The connector descriptor defines no secret fields, and the open API endpoints (for example https://api.llama.fi/protocols) respond successfully without any API key, token, or credential header.

setupSteps.title: Confirm there is nothing to configure
setupSteps.body: This connector is manifest-only with no secret fields and no config fields. There are no credentials to supply and no parameters to set, so no setup input is needed before syncing.

setupSteps.title: Verify connectivity to the open API
setupSteps.body: Ensure the environment running the connector can reach the public DefiLlama host over HTTPS. A request such as GET https://api.llama.fi/protocols returns data without authentication, confirming access.
